title: Quick work
question: 把今天课文里的“突然收到通知 -> 有点担心 -> 发现是失物找回 -> 又惊讶又觉得好笑”放进自己的生活场景：学校办公室告诉你一个很久以前丢的东西找到了。把下面 3 个空补完整，用 word bank 里的词或短语。
example_answer: I received a message from the school office. I was asked to go there, so I was worried. Then I was told that my bicycle had been found. I was very surprised and amused, because I never expected it to be found.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 说明收到通知：学校办公室发来消息

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 说明被叫过去：不知道原因，所以担心
options.english_template: I ___ to go there, so I was worried.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 说明好消息：很久以前丢的自行车已经找到了
options.english_template: I was told that my bicycle ___.
